# Axion Mobile 1.0.1

Bugfix release. **All v1.0.0 users should update.**

The signing key, package id (`com.almostkoi.axion`) and database schema
are unchanged — installing the v1.0.1 APK on top of v1.0.0 keeps your
library and settings intact.

---

## What's fixed

### YouTube / YT Music playlist URLs no longer fail to import

**Symptom on v1.0.0:** pasting a playlist URL like
`https://music.youtube.com/playlist?list=PL...` (with no `?v=...`)
failed every backend with:

> Could not parse a YouTube video id from that URL
> Could not parse a YouTube video id from that URL
> Could not parse a YouTube video id from that URL
> All YouTube proxies failed.

**Why it happened:** the per-video extractors (Piped / Invidious /
Innertube) need a video id, and a pure playlist URL doesn't contain
one. The desktop app sidesteps this because `yt-dlp` understands
playlists natively; the mobile app didn't.

**Fix:** when the URL is playlist-only, the importer now resolves it to
the **first track** of the playlist (Piped's `/playlists/{id}` endpoint,
falling back to Invidious's `/api/v1/playlists/{id}`) and downloads
that track. This matches the desktop app's `--no-playlist` behaviour.

The Jobs panel will now show the resolved track plus the playlist name,
e.g. `Daft Punk — One More Time (from playlist "Discovery")`.

> Whole-playlist imports (downloading every track in one go) are still
> a future feature — see the v1.x roadmap.

## Downloads

Same architecture matrix as v1.0.0. **`arm64-v8a`** for any phone from
2019 onwards. Universal if you don't know.

| File | Size | Recommended for |
|---|---|---|
| `Axion-1.0.1-arm64-v8a.apk` | ~31 MB | **Most users.** All modern 64-bit Android phones. |
| `Axion-1.0.1-armeabi-v7a.apk` | ~25 MB | Older / cheaper 32-bit devices (Android 8–10 era). |
| `Axion-1.0.1-x86_64.apk` | ~33 MB | Emulators and Chromebooks. |
| `Axion-1.0.1-universal.apk` | ~83 MB | "I don't know which one" — works on every architecture. |

## Installation

If you have v1.0.0 installed, just open the new APK and tap **Update**;
your library stays. Otherwise see the [v1.0.0 install guide](https://github.com/almostkoi/axion-mobile/releases/tag/v1.0.0).

## Verifying the APK

```powershell
Get-FileHash .\Axion-1.0.1-arm64-v8a.apk -Algorithm SHA256
```

Same signing certificate as v1.0.0:

```
Owner:   CN=almostkoi, OU=Axion, O=Axion
Issuer:  same (self-signed)
Valid:   until April 2056
```

## Full changelog

- **fix(yt):** resolve playlist-only URLs to first track via Piped + Invidious instead of erroring out
- **chore(import):** export `getPipedInstances` / `getInvidiousInstances` / `pipedJson` / `invJson` for reuse by the new playlist resolver
- **chore(version):** bump to 1.0.1 (`versionCode` 10001)

## Reporting issues

Open an issue with:

- Axion Mobile version (Settings → About)
- Phone model + Android version
- Steps to reproduce
- Logs via `adb logcat -s AxionMobile:V ReactNativeJS:V *:S` if you can capture them
